title: Free Webinar: NEBOSH career pathways in 2026
summary: A 45-minute live session on how to choose between NEBOSH IGC, Diploma and sector certificates — with live Q&A from our lead faculty.

title: Workshop: ISO 45001 internal auditor masterclass
summary: Two-day hands-on masterclass for internal auditors — stage one audit planning, nonconformity writing and closing the audit cycle.

title: Open Day: Talk to our faculty
summary: Tour our training suites, meet lead faculty, and map out your qualification pathway with an admissions advisor.

title: Cohort start: NEBOSH IGC (Evenings)
summary: Our June evening cohort for the NEBOSH International General Certificate begins — last enrolment 28 May.

title: Seminar: HACCP for hospitality leaders
summary: A three-hour executive briefing for F&B directors on audit-ready HACCP, allergen controls and supplier assurance.

title: Webinar: ESG disclosure for HSE teams
summary: How TCFD, ISSB S1 and S2 are reshaping the HSE remit — and a practical path to the first disclosure.

title: Workshop: Fire risk assessment that passes Civil Defence
summary: One-day deep dive on PAS 79, GCC Civil Defence expectations and building a defensible assessment dossier.

title: Cohort start: IOSH Managing Safely (Weekend)
summary: A four-Saturday cohort of IOSH Managing Safely — last enrolment 10 June.

title: Webinar: Behavioural safety without the posters
summary: Why leading indicators and observation programmes actually shift outcomes — and what to stop doing.

title: Workshop: Permit-to-work system design
summary: A two-day workshop for operations and HSE leads on designing a permit-to-work system that doesn't get bypassed.

title: Cohort start: OTHM Level 6 Diploma (Online)
summary: Our July online cohort of the OTHM Level 6 Diploma in Occupational Health and Safety begins.

title: Riyadh Open Day
summary: Tour our Riyadh delivery hub, meet regional faculty and lock in your qualification pathway.
